import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut total = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut in_num = false
  mut sign = 1
  mut val = 0
  while i <= n
    let b_opt = if i < n
      string.byte_at(line, i)
    else
      Some(32)
    end
    let b = match b_opt
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      32
    end

    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if in_num
        let signed = sign * val
        if signed > 0
          total = total + signed
        else if signed < 0
          total = total - signed
        end
        in_num = false
        sign = 1
        val = 0
      end
    else if b == 45
      sign = -1
      in_num = true
    else if b == 43
      in_num = true
    else
      val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
      in_num = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  println("r=#{total}")
end
